notes.DATABASE_URL: Postgres URL, or on Railway web service: ${{ Postgres.DATABASE_URL }}
notes.NEXTAUTH_URL: https://your-app.up.railway.app — no trailing slash; not YOUR_DOMAIN_HERE
notes.NEXTAUTH_SECRET: Random string (e.g. openssl rand -base64 32), not GENERATE_WITH_...
notes.STRIPE_PRICE_*: Stripe Dashboard → Products → Price ID (price_...). deploy:check requires all three; if you only sell one tier, create placeholder prices or duplicate IDs per Stripe rules.
notes.OPENAI_API_KEY: DALL·E / GPT Image / Whisper / OpenAI chat path; set if you use those features
notes.APP_URL: Same public origin as NEXTAUTH_URL — used for absolute URLs to uploads in production
